summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OTP-based password change/reset feature. All backend endpoints implemented correctly, frontend UI components working, and existing functionality preserved.

expected_twilio_limitations.issue: Twilio trial account cannot send to unverified numbers

expected_twilio_limitations.note: This is documented in requirements as expected behavior
